T0271.title: Burner Account
T0271.definition: Cannon fodder account refers to a disposable account used to probe a platform's risk control rules or carry out high-risk operations.
T0271.description: These accounts serve as suicide squads for black-hat actors, performing sensitive actions like bulk following, mass messaging, or posting prohibited content. Once the account triggers a ban, the operator immediately activates a new cannon fodder account to continue the campaign, thereby protecting high-value main accounts from being implicated.
T0271.usageExample: Let's not leave a direct negative review. Get a cannon fodder account and use it to find some scam reviewers for him.
